x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces DCWP's open regulatory lifecycle (licenses, applications, inspections, charges, consumer complaints, worker-protection matters) and adds apply_for_license and file_complaint — the two net-new write workflows locked today in the NYC Business portal and 311.

server.name: io.nyc.dcwp
server.title: NYC Consumer & Worker Protection (DCWP)
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Department of Consumer and Worker Protection — issued business licenses, license applications, inspections, charges/violations, consumer complaints, and Office of Labor Policy & Standards worker-protection matters from NYC Open Data, plus the net-new ability to apply for a license and file a consumer complaint that today live only in the Java NYC Business portal or 311.
server.instructions: Use find_licenses / get_license to look up a DCWP-issued business license by type, status, borough, or Business Unique ID. find_applications / get_application track a license application; find_inspections, find_charges, and find_consumer_complaints follow the enforcement lifecycle (an inspection or complaint leads to charges) — all joinable on Business Unique ID and License Number. find_worker_protection_cases returns AGGREGATE OLPS inquiries and enforcement matters (never an individual worker). apply_for_license (net-new) submits a license application; file_complaint (net-new) files a consumer complaint against a business. Both mutate state and require an authenticated user — confirm the business, category/complaint code, and details with the user before submitting.

tools.name: find_licenses
tools.title: Find Licenses
tools.description: Search DCWP-issued business licenses by borough, license type, status, Business Unique ID, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_license
tools.title: Get License
tools.description: Fetch a DCWP-issued business license by license number.

tools.name: find_applications
tools.title: Find License Applications
tools.description: Search DCWP license applications by borough, application type, status, or Business Unique ID.

tools.name: get_application
tools.title: Get License Application
tools.description: Fetch a DCWP license application by Application ID.

tools.name: find_inspections
tools.title: Find Inspections
tools.description: Search DCWP inspections by borough, inspection type, status, Business Unique ID, or DCWP license number.

tools.name: find_charges
tools.title: Find Charges
tools.description: Search DCWP charges / violations by Business Unique ID, inspection number, or hearing outcome.

tools.name: find_consumer_complaints
tools.title: Find Consumer Complaints
tools.description: Search published DCWP consumer complaints by borough, complaint code, Business Unique ID, or free text.

tools.name: find_worker_protection_cases
tools.title: Find Worker Protection Cases
tools.description: Return AGGREGATE Office of Labor Policy & Standards inquiries and enforcement matters by topic, industry, or type (paid safe/sick leave, fair workweek, etc.). Never returns an individual worker.

tools.name: apply_for_license
tools.title: Apply for a License
tools.description: Submit a DCWP business license application. NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the Java NYC Business portal (nyc-business.nyc.gov). Requires an authenticated applicant. Mutates state — confirm license type, business, and address first.

tools.name: file_complaint
tools.title: File a Consumer Complaint
tools.description: File a consumer complaint against a business with DCWP. NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in 311 or a DCWP web form. Requires an authenticated complainant. Mutates state — confirm the business, complaint code, and description first.

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.

prompts.name: explore_dcwp
prompts.description: Search and read NYC Consumer & Worker Protection (DCWP) records — Licenses, Applications, Inspections, Enforcement.

prompts.name: apply_for_dcwp
prompts.description: File a consumer complaint (ConsumerComplaint) and apply for a business license (LicenseApplication) — the two citizen writes with no API

prompts.name: report_dcwp
prompts.description: File a consumer complaint (ConsumerComplaint) and apply for a business license (LicenseApplication) — the two citizen writes with no API

resources.name: NYC Consumer & Worker Protection (DCWP) — profile
resources.description: NYC Consumer & Worker Protection (DCWP): 11 operations, 10 tools, verb “bind”.

resources.name: Licenses record (templated)
resources.description: A single NYC Consumer & Worker Protection (DCWP) Licenses record by id.
